targets.name: pylabview
targets.notes: CI consumes checked-in JSON baselines and does not require Python or pylabview at test time.

targets.name: pylavi
targets.notes: Add a generator once a stable local pylavi checkout and CLI/API entry point are available.

targets.name: native-labview
coverage: exported geometry or inspection data where available
targets.notes: Native LabVIEW is not expected in CI. Store manually exported artifacts and fixture provenance when available.
